markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User provided structured content for Ludivine & les Divines spiritual book project including Vision, 5 Books, 7 Revelations, narrative canon, and community framework. Initial Notion page created successfully. Website update attempted but encountered design preservation conflict when user discovered existing magnificent site was completely replaced rather than enhanced additively. Session ended with rollback request and access issues to original source code.


## Context & Intent

User wanted to update Ludivine's website with new Bible v1.0 content while preserving existing design and UI/UX. The content represents a spiritual pentalogy with elemental structure (Water, Fire, Earth, Air, Ether) and specific narrative phases.


## What Was Done

Created Notion page with complete content structure. Attempted website creation but replaced existing site entirely instead of integrating additively. Identified the original beautiful site at ludivine-bqu6gytj.manus.space and planned integration approach.


## Outputs Produced

- [notion_page] Ludivine & les Divines — Portail — Complete structured content in Notion with Vision, 5 Books, 7 Revelations, canon and community sections
- [website] Ludivine site replacement — Complete site recreation (later identified as problematic replacement)
- [integration_plan] Content integration strategy — Plan to merge Bible v1.0 content with existing site structure

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Created Notion page in Manus Memory Hub under existing Ludivine project
- Identified need to preserve existing site design rather than replace
- Established narrative canon correction: 3 main phases not 6, with transitions

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Notion integration successful
- Content structure well organized
- User feedback clear on design requirements
Failed / suboptimal:

- Replaced existing beautiful site instead of enhancing it
- Didn't check for existing site before creating new one
Discoveries:

- Original site exists at ludivine-bqu6gytj.manus.space with excellent design
- User has specific narrative canon corrections (3 phases structure)

## Challenges & Blockers

- Cannot access source code of existing ludivine-bqu6gytj.manus.space site
- Need to preserve original design while adding new content
- Access limitations to cross-project Manus resources

## Open Questions

- How to access ludivine-bqu6gytj project source code?
- What specific design elements must be preserved from original site?
- How to implement the 3-phase narrative canon correctly?

## Next Steps

- Obtain access to ludivine-bqu6gytj project source code
- Implement corrected narrative canon structure (3 phases + transitions)
- Create additive integration strategy preserving original design
- Add individual book pages with 12 chapters each
- Integrate Typeform for community questions system
